scripts.build:go: go build -o dist/sikong ./cmd/sikong && go build -o dist/sikongd ./cmd/sikongd
scripts.check: bun run check:go && bun run typecheck && bun run lint && bun run fmt:check && bun run check:js
scripts.check:js: bun --filter agent-loop test && bun --filter @sikong/workspace test && bun --filter @sikong/client build
scripts.typecheck: bun --filter agent-loop typecheck && bun --filter @sikong/workspace typecheck && bun --filter @sikong/client typecheck
